title: Amara Raja Batteries is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Amara Raja Batteries is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Quality Control Engineer looking for your next big career move? Amara Raja Batteries in Kolkata offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Amara Raja Batteries:
Amara Raja Batteries is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amara Raja Batteries!
